source_name: Code4rena Ethena Labs Findings and Analysis Report (2024-11) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_claim: If the collateral_asset is native token, minting is unavailable even though redeeming is available.
why_it_looked_bad: In the _transferCollateral function, if the collateral_asset is native token, it reverts. This causes minting reverts.
why_not_valid: native collateral minting unavailability is an asset-configuration limitation while redemption remains available; no direct theft path is shown
downgrade_reason: native collateral minting unavailability is an asset-configuration limitation while redemption remains available; no direct theft path is shown
trust_assumption: Treat as a caution/false-positive reference unless the current target shows permissionless reachability, direct value loss, and concrete affected code path.
when_it_could_be_real: if combined with permissionless access or large-value state transitions
if the affected path becomes critical to mint/redeem/withdrawal solvency or availability
